label: Licensor's Hearth
description: Licensor's Hearth occupies a converted chamber within Cindervale’s ancient masonry, its cracked ashlar bound by later blackened brick buttresses and iron strapwork. Built-in shelving and a wall-secured strongbox impose the domestic order of a records-keeping household, while soot-stained rafters testify to long reliance on brazier heat. A narrow slit window faces the survey-marker ring, its shutters reinforced to meet quarantine ordinance and breach-zone interdiction. The interior is spare and durable, emphasizing custodial habit, lawful restraint, and the city’s frontier austerity.
